base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dry_bones_boo — a character from 1990 super mario world. Dry Bones + Boo palette/size variants — haunted-house enemies. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
